lenses.description: A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's CJ series, this ultra-wide 12x lens is built for ENG and documentary field work. Its wide end suits tight interiors and establishing shots, and it stays compact and light for handheld, run-and-gun shooting. Like the rest of the series it resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and the BT.2020 wide colour gamut, and pairs a built-in 2x extender with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch broadcast controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's UHDgc series. This wide-angle 14x lens is aimed at documentary and newsgathering field production, compact and light for high-mobility shooting, and it holds 4K resolving power across the full zoom range and the 16:9 image plane. It supports HDR imaging and BT.2020 wide-gamut colour correction, and pairs a built-in 2x extender with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch broadcast controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's premium UHDxs line, this ultra-wide 15x lens covers the same wide end as the rest of Canon's wide portable trio with a little more reach. Compact and light for ENG and documentary field work, it resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and BT.2020 wide-gamut colour, and combines a built-in 2x extender with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's UHDgc line, this standard-range 15x lens adds Canon's Vari-Angle Prism image stabilisation to damp horizontal and vertical vibration during mobile shooting such as sports. It resolves 4K across the zoom range and supports HDR and the BT.2020 wide colour gamut. It forgoes a built-in extender to stay compact and light, and uses a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch broadcast controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's UHDgc line, this long-throw 18x lens trades a wide angle of view for reach, built to pull in distant subjects in sports and field work while staying light enough for shoulder-mounted operation. Its built-in 2x extender roughly doubles that reach. It resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and BT.2020 wide-gamut colour, and uses a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's UHDgc line, this compact standard-range 18x lens is a general-purpose ENG and documentary field lens. It resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and the BT.2020 wide colour gamut, and stays light enough for sustained shoulder-mounted shooting, with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch broadcast controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's premium UHDxs line, this wide-angle 20x lens pairs a wide starting angle with a useful 20x range for ENG, sports and documentary field work. It resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and BT.2020 wide-gamut colour, and combines a built-in 2x extender with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's premium UHDxs line, this standard-to-telephoto 20x lens suits ENG and field production that needs extra reach without moving to a box lens. It resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and the BT.2020 wide colour gamut, and combines a built-in 2x extender with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's UHDgc line, this telephoto 24x lens extends a standard wide end to a long reach for sports and event field work while staying portable enough for shoulder use. It resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and BT.2020 wide-gamut colour, and combines a built-in 2x extender with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch controllers.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's premium UHDxs line, this telephoto 27x lens is among the newest in the range and carries Canon's eXs-V digital drive. Its long reach suits sports and event field work while remaining portable. It resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and the BT.2020 wide colour gamut, and pairs a built-in 2x extender with controls compatible with standard 2/3-inch broadcast demands.

sources: Canon Operation Manual OMLS-D037A, Sect. 7 Product Specifications: Thread for Filters 127 mm P0.75 (lens barrel thread size).
lenses.description: A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's premium UHDxs line, this long-throw 45x field lens pushes well into box-lens reach and adds image stabilisation for handheld and unstable-platform work. It bridges portable and box-lens territory for sports and outside broadcast, resolving 4K across the zoom range with HDR and BT.2020 wide-gamut support and a digital drive for standard 2/3-inch controllers.

sources: Canon Operation Manual OMLS-D037A, Sect. 7 Product Specifications: Thread for Filters 127 mm P0.75 (lens barrel thread size).
lenses.description: A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's CJ series, this 45x super-telephoto field lens combines a wider starting angle with long reach, positioned as the 4K successor to Canon's HD HJ40 field zooms for sports and outside broadcast. It resolves 4K across the zoom range, supports HDR and BT.2020 wide-gamut colour, and pairs a built-in 2x extender with a digital drive compatible with standard 2/3-inch controllers.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this super-wide 11x lens was the widest-angle HDTV portable lens of its generation, built for HD newsgathering and documentary field work. It stays light for handheld and shoulder use and carries the series' 16-bit digital drive, internal focus and shuttle-shot programmable positioning, with a built-in 2x extender for instant reach. It was later succeeded by the wider-range HJ14ex4.3B.

A 2/3-inch HD cine-style zoom from Canon's HD-EC (High Definition Electronic Cinematography) line, the wide member of Canon's three EC zooms. Like the rest of the EC range it is built for film-style handling rather than ENG: a 270-degree focus rotation, engraved focus and iris scales, and gear rings matched to studio follow-focus and motorised rigs, with no servo drive and no extender. A constant T2.1 aperture with very low focus breathing and minimal ramping gives it a film-like rendering for commercials, drama and motion-picture work on 2/3-inch cameras. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this ultra-wide 14x lens is the successor to the long-running HJ11ex4.7B wide-angle, built for HD newsgathering and documentary field work. It opens to a bright f/1.8 across much of its range and stays compact and light for handheld and shoulder use, carrying the series' digital drive, internal focus and a built-in 2x extender. It is the HD counterpart to Canon's later 4K CJ14ex4.3B.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's HDxs line and the world's first portable 2/3-inch HDTV zoom with a built-in optical image stabiliser. Its Vari-Angle Prism (VAP-IS) system damps a wide range of vibration, from handheld and shoulder shake to unstable platforms and moving vehicles, across the full zoom range and with selectable stabilisation modes, which makes it well suited to mobile sports and drama field work. It is the HD predecessor of Canon's 4K CJ15ex8.5B.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this wide-angle 17x lens pairs a wide starting angle with a useful standard range for HD newsgathering and documentary field work. It stays light for handheld and shoulder use and carries the series' digital drive, internal focus and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this standard-range 17x lens is a general-purpose ENG workhorse, light and compact for sustained handheld and shoulder-mounted shooting. It covers the everyday wide-to-telephoto range for newsgathering and field production, with the series' digital drive, internal focus and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this long-throw lens trades a wide angle of view for reach, with a narrow wide end opening onto a long telephoto that the built-in 2x extender pushes further still. It is built to pull in distant subjects in sports and EFP field work while staying light enough for shoulder-mounted operation, with the series' digital drive and internal focus. It is the HD counterpart to Canon's later 4K CJ18ex28B.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this standard 18x lens covers a general-purpose wide-to-telephoto range for HD newsgathering and documentary field work. It stays light for handheld and shoulder use and carries the series' digital drive, internal focus and a built-in 2x extender. It is the HD counterpart to Canon's later 4K CJ18ex7.6B. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this compact 21x lens is aimed at studio and EFP field production, holding its framing with very little shift through focus pulls. It stays light and mobile for handheld and shoulder use across a standard-to-telephoto range, with the series' digital drive, internal focus and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD cine-style zoom from Canon's HD-EC (High Definition Electronic Cinematography) line, the longest of Canon's three EC zooms. Built for film-style handling rather than ENG, it carries a 270-degree focus rotation, engraved focus and iris scales, and gear rings for studio follow-focus and motorised rigs, with no servo drive and no extender. A constant T2.1 aperture and exceptionally low focus breathing give it the rendering of a cine prime across a standard-to-telephoto range, for commercials, drama and motion-picture work on 2/3-inch cameras. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this telephoto 22x lens extends a standard wide end to a long reach for HD newsgathering and field work, while staying light enough for handheld and shoulder use. It carries the series' digital drive, internal focus and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's eHDxs line, this telephoto 24x lens reaches a long tele end for sports and EFP field work while remaining portable enough for shoulder use. It carries the series' digital drive, internal focus and a built-in 2x extender. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD field telephoto zoom from Canon's HDxs line, this 40x lens pairs a usable wide end with a long telephoto reach that the built-in 2x extender pushes further still, for sports, aerial and outside-broadcast field work. A built-in Optical Shift Image Stabiliser steadies the long end against wind and operator movement, and its advanced digital servo supports fast, repeatable framing. It is the wider-starting companion to the longer-throw HJ40ex14B.

A 2/3-inch HD field telephoto zoom from Canon's HDxs line, this long-throw 40x lens reaches well into super-telephoto territory, extended further by its built-in 2x extender, for sports, aerial and outside-broadcast coverage at distance. A built-in Optical Shift Image Stabiliser steadies the extreme telephoto end against wind and movement, and its advanced digital servo supports fast, repeatable framing. It is the longer-reaching companion to the HJ40ex10B.

A 2/3-inch HD field telephoto zoom from Canon's e-HDxs line, this 40x DIGISUPER-series field lens covers a long wide-to-telephoto range that the built-in 2x extender pushes further still, for documentary, natural-history and sports work at long distance. A built-in Optical Shift Image Stabiliser steadies the long end against wind and movement, and a framing-preset function recalls rehearsed zoom positions at the push of a button, alongside internal focus and crossover switching between 16:9 and 4:3.

A 2/3-inch HD cine-style zoom from Canon's HD-EC (High Definition Electronic Cinematography) line, and the widest of Canon's three EC zooms. It is built for film-style handling rather than electronic newsgathering: a 270-degree focus rotation, engraved focus and iris scales, and gear rings matched to studio follow-focus and motorised control rigs, with no servo drive and no extender. A constant T2.1 aperture with very low focus breathing and minimal ramping gives it the rendering and feel of a cine prime in zoom form, aimed at commercials, drama and motion-picture work on 2/3-inch cameras. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch portable EFP telephoto zoom from Canon's J series, a standard-definition lens family for NTSC and SDTV field production. The J35ex11B is built for documentary, natural-history and sports work that shoots from a distance, staying portable enough for remote and demanding locations, with full servo control and a built-in 2x extender; it remains in use in legacy SD workflows.

sources: Canon Operation Manual OMLS-D037A, Sect. 7 Product Specifications: Thread for Filters 125 mm P1.0 (lens barrel thread size).
lenses.description: A 2/3-inch portable EFP zoom from Canon's standard-definition J series, the J35ex15B is the ultra-telephoto companion to the J35ex11B, trading a wider angle for greater reach in NTSC and SDTV field production. It suits long-distance documentary, natural-history and sports coverage from remote locations, with full servo control and a built-in 2x extender; it remains in use in legacy SD workflows.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's KJ series, the company's affordable HDgc line built to bring HD-grade optics to lower-cost ENG cameras and camcorders. This super-wide 10x lens opens to a very wide angle of view for newsgathering, reality TV and budget-conscious HD production, staying compact and light for handheld and shoulder use, with a built-in 2x extender and digital drive.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's affordable HDgc KJ line, this compact 13x lens covers a general-purpose wide-to-telephoto range for newsgathering and budget HD production. It forgoes a built-in extender to stay light and simple, with internal focus and Shuttle Shot programmable zoom positions. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's affordable HDgc KJ line, this lightweight 16x lens covers a standard ENG range for newsgathering and budget HD production. It stays compact for sustained handheld and shoulder use, with a built-in 2x extender and digital drive. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's affordable HDgc KJ line, this standard 17x lens is a light, general-purpose ENG workhorse for newsgathering, reality TV and budget HD production, with reduced focus breathing and a fast f/1.9 maximum aperture for low light. It carries a built-in 2x extender, internal focus and Shuttle Shot programmable zoom positions.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's affordable HDgc KJ line, this 20x lens pairs Canon's widest starting angle in the affordable 20x class with a long telephoto reach doubled by its built-in 2x extender, for ENG, corporate, education and event work. It holds a fast f/1.9 aperture across much of the range, with internal focus and Shuttle Shot programmable zoom positions.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's affordable HDgc KJ line, this 20x telephoto lens balances performance and portability in a very light, compact body, with internal focus and Shuttle Shot programmable zoom positions. It covers a standard-to-telephoto range for cost-effective HD newsgathering and field production, with a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's affordable HDgc KJ line, this telephoto 21x lens extends a standard wide end to a long reach for HD newsgathering and field work, while staying light for shoulder use. It carries a built-in 2x extender and digital drive. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's affordable HDgc KJ line, this telephoto 22x lens covers a generous range while still offering a modest wide angle, giving a flexible framing range for outdoor HD newsgathering and many production applications. It balances size, weight and optical performance, with a built-in 2x extender and digital drive.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch 4K UHD premium box lens from Canon's UHD-DIGISUPER (UJ) line, this 111x field optic uses fluorite and UD glass with Canon's Air Sphere Coating to suppress flare and ghosting across an exceptionally long zoom. It holds beyond-4K resolution and HDR to the edge of the frame, with image stabilisation, a built-in 2x extender and a 16-bit encoder for virtual production.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch 4K UHD premium box lens from Canon's UHD-DIGISUPER (UJ) line, this 122x field optic offered the longest focal range in its class at launch, generous fluorite and UD glass holding 4K HDR quality across the zoom while a built-in 2x extender pushes reach further still. Advanced image stabilisation steadies the long end, and a 16-bit encoder with a 20-pin connector feeds accurate metadata to virtual production systems.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: The autofocus version of Canon's flagship 122x UHD-DIGISUPER box lens, adding precise, customisable autofocus that has become important for 4K productions while keeping the optics of the standard UJ122x8.2B. It pairs fluorite and UD glass and advanced image stabilisation with a built-in 2x extender for extreme reach, and outputs accurate lens metadata over a 16-bit encoder and 20-pin connector for virtual production.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch 4K UHD studio box lens from Canon's UHD-DIGISUPER (UJ) line, this wide 25x lens covers a standard studio range with the series' fluorite and UD glass for beyond-4K, center-to-edge sharpness and HDR. It carries a built-in 2x extender and a 16-bit encoder for virtual studio systems, and shares the size, controls and accessories of Canon's HD box lenses for easy integration.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD studio and field box lens from Canon's UHD-DIGISUPER (UJ) line, this wide-standard 27x lens pairs fluorite and UD glass with Canon's Constant Angle Focusing System to suppress focus breathing, holding a pin-sharp image through focus and zoom. Bright and compact, it supports HDR, carries a built-in 2x extender and a 20-pin virtual-studio connector, and fits both studio and heavy field workflows.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD field box lens from Canon's UHD-DIGISUPER (UJ) line, this 66x sports lens covers a wide arena with a single optic, holding beyond-4K resolution and contrast from center to edge with HDR support. It carries a built-in 2x extender and a 16-bit encoder for virtual production, and matches the size and connectors of Canon's HD field lenses for drop-in integration.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD field box lens from Canon's UHD-DIGISUPER (UJ) line, this high-ratio 86x lens holds class-leading beyond-4K performance to the edge of the frame, with image stabilisation that keeps that quality steady through pans and vibration. It supports HDR and virtual systems via a 16-bit encoder, carries a built-in 2x extender, and shares connectors and protocols with Canon's HD broadcast lenses.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD field box lens from Canon's UHD-DIGISUPER (UJ) line, this versatile 90x lens covers large sports arenas from a single position while sustaining 4K resolution even with image stabilisation engaged. It carries a built-in 2x extender and a 16-bit encoder for virtual systems, and matches HD field lenses in size and accessories so it slots into existing setups.

The flagship of Canon's HD DIGISUPER field-box line, the 2/3-inch XJ100x9.3B reaches a 100x zoom range for the most demanding stadium and live-event coverage. It carries a built-in optical Shift-IS image stabilizer, the Power Optical System with X-Element and focus-breathing correction, plus sealing against dust, rain and radio interference, with an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch HD studio box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ22x7.3B is the compact, comparatively lightweight member of the group, built for studio and indoor production where a full-size box lens would be unwieldy. It offers a wide standard zoom range with full digital servo zoom and focus, an internal filter system and a built-in 2x extender.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch HD studio box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ23x7B pairs a wide standard zoom range with the steadiness of a full-size studio box for indoor and studio productions. It carries full digital servo zoom and focus, an internal filter system and a built-in 2x extender.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch HD studio box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ25x6.8B offers a wide-to-standard zoom range for studio and indoor production. It carries full digital servo zoom and focus, an internal filter system and a built-in 2x extender. Discontinued.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch HD studio box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ27x6.5B is a wide-angle studio box that opens onto a broad field of view for tighter studio sets and indoor venues. It carries full digital servo zoom and focus, an internal filter system and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ60x9B is built for stadium sports and outside-broadcast coverage, reaching well into telephoto from a stage-friendly wide end. Like the rest of the field-box range it uses Canon's Power Optical System with focus-breathing correction and supports virtual-production encoder outputs, with an internal filter system and a built-in 2x extender.

fieldNotes.hasMacro: Macro available via optional MCJ-S02 accessory

lenses.description: A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ72x9.3B lifts the magnification for long-range stadium and live-event coverage. It shares the field-box family's Power Optical System and focus-breathing correction, with virtual-production encoder support, an internal filter system and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ75x9.3B is a high-magnification long-throw lens for stadium sports and outside broadcast. It carries a built-in optical image stabilizer to steady the long telephoto end, alongside the family's Power Optical System, focus-breathing correction and virtual-production encoder support, with an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ76x9B pairs a notably wide 9mm wide end with a high-magnification telephoto reach, letting a single lens cover a full stadium view or a tight detail. It shares the field-box family's Power Optical System and focus-breathing correction, with virtual-production encoder support, an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ80x8.8B is a high-magnification long-throw lens for stadium sports and outside-broadcast coverage. It carries a built-in optical image stabilizer for the long telephoto end, alongside the field-box family's Power Optical System with X-Element and focus-breathing correction, an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ86x13.5B is the long-throw telephoto companion to the wider XJ86x9.3B, trading wide coverage for extreme reach into deep super-telephoto. It uses the field-box family's Power Optical System with X-Element and focus-breathing correction, with an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ86x9.3B became one of the most widely used long field lenses in HD outside-broadcast fleets, pairing a wide-for-its-class start with high-magnification reach for stadium sports. It uses the field-box family's Power Optical System with X-Element and focus-breathing correction, with an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender; the XJ86x13.5B is its longer-throw companion.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ86x9.3B AF adds Canon's phase-detection autofocus to the popular XJ86x9.3B while keeping the same optics, easing subject tracking in fast live coverage. It shares the field-box family's Power Optical System with X-Element and focus-breathing correction, with an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ95x12.4B is an ultra-long-throw telephoto box built for the longest reaches in stadium and live-event coverage, the tele-biased member of the DIGISUPER 95 pair. It uses the field-box family's Power Optical System with X-Element and focus-breathing correction, with an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender. Discontinued.

A 2/3-inch HD field box lens from Canon's DIGISUPER line, the XJ95x8.6B pairs a wider start with very high magnification for stadium sports and outside broadcast, the field-biased member of the DIGISUPER 95 pair. It carries a built-in optical image stabilizer alongside the family's Power Optical System with X-Element and focus-breathing correction, with an internal filter and a built-in 2x extender.

A 2/3-inch 4K UHD portable broadcast zoom from Canon's CJ line, part of the UHDxs series, the CJ25ex7.6B is a high-magnification standard-to-telephoto lens for 4K ENG, documentary and live outside-broadcast work such as sports, nature and concerts. It stays light enough for sustained shoulder use while reaching well into telephoto, with a built-in 2x extender, full digital servo control and a 16-bit drive supporting virtual production, holding 4K resolution across the range with HDR and BT.2020 wide-gamut support.
